---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like?
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## Why do you need this?
Describe the use case. What problem does this solve or what benefit does it provide?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you envision this feature working. Include any relevant examples or mockups if helpful.

## Alternatives considered
Have you considered other approaches? What alternatives did you reject and why?
